Our Services

Every Detail, Handled

From the moment you land to the last drone shot at sunset — no headaches, no compromises.

Yacht Charters
25+ vessels — motor yachts, catamarans & the 132ft Paradise 60 superyacht. Phuket, Pattaya, Koh Samui.
Flight Tickets & Private Jets
Domestic, regional & international ticketing. Group bookings & private jet charters across Southeast Asia.
Hotel & Villa Booking
Hand-picked luxury villas & hotels in Phuket, Pattaya & Bangkok — vetted for quality & experience.
Limousine & Car Rental
Private limousines, luxury SUVs & group vans. Airport transfers, city tours & full-day charters.
Festival Tickets & VIP Tables
Official partner for Thailand's major EDM events. VIP, VVIP & SVIP table reservations.
Photography, Video & Drone
Professional event photography, 4K video production & cinematic aerial drone footage.
DJ & Event Production
Professional DJs, sound systems & full event production for pool villas & corporate events.
Private Tours & Experiences
Custom private tours, island hopping, cultural excursions & bespoke day-trip itineraries.

Our Story

Mingalar Paradise Travels
Est. 2016 — TAT Licensed

Founded in 2016, M-VibeTrip is a premier travel agency specialising in luxury yacht charters, private jets, exclusive villa bookings and EDM festival experiences across Thailand. From university group staycations to SVIP festival tables — we handle every detail so you just experience.

Luxury Fleet
25+ vessels across Thailand's finest marine destinations
Festival Partner
Official partner for Tomorrowland, EDC & 808 Thailand
Visual Storytelling
In-house photography, drone & 4K video production
100% Satisfaction
Seamless, professional & unforgettable every time

    Our Story

    Who We Are

    Founded in 2016, M-VibeTrip began as a boutique travel agency connecting Myanmar clients with premium Thailand experiences. What started small has grown into one of Southeast Asia's most trusted luxury travel and event companies.

    We specialise in luxury yacht charters, private jets, exclusive villa bookings and EDM festival experiences across Thailand. From university group staycations to SVIP festival tables and 5-star corporate retreats.

    We're bilingual (Myanmar & English), KBZ Pay accepted, and our team is available 24/7 from enquiry to return flight.

    Why Choose Us

    The M-VibeTrip Difference

    TAT Licensed & IATA Certified
    Fully licensed by Thailand's Tourism Authority. Professional, safe and accountable.
    25+ Vessel Fleet
    From speedboats to the iconic 132ft Paradise 60 superyacht — every occasion covered.
    In-House Content Team
    Photography, 4K video & drone — your trip documented beautifully by our own creative team.
    KBZ Pay Accepted
    Bilingual team serving Myanmar clients since 2016. KBZ Pay, bank transfer & card accepted.

    Ready to plan your next experience?

    Reach out to our team — we'll get back within a few hours with a personalised proposal.

    WhatsApp Us
